face_exercises.name: Mouth Open
face_exercises.description: Open your mouth as wide as possible, then close it slowly. Repeat the movement in a controlled manner.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Open your mouth wide. Close it slowly. Repeat.
steps: Open mouth as wide as possible

face_exercises.name: Smile
face_exercises.description: Smile as wide as you can, stretching your lips to the sides. Hold briefly, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Smile wide stretching your lips. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Smile as wide as you can

face_exercises.name: Blink
face_exercises.description: Blink your eyes forcefully, squeezing them shut, then open wide. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Blink forcefully. Squeeze eyes shut then open wide. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Eyebrow Raise
face_exercises.description: Raise both eyebrows as high as possible. Hold for a moment, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise your eyebrows high. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Raise both eyebrows as high as possible

face_exercises.name: Lip Pucker
face_exercises.description: Pucker your lips as if giving a kiss. Hold for a moment, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Pucker your lips forward like a kiss. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Pucker lips like giving a kiss

face_exercises.name: Left Wink
face_exercises.description: Wink your left eye while keeping the right eye open. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Wink your left eye. Keep right eye open. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Right Wink
face_exercises.description: Wink your right eye while keeping the left eye open. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Wink your right eye. Keep left eye open. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Jaw Shift
face_exercises.description: Shift your jaw to the left, then to the right, then back to center. Repeat the full cycle.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Shift your jaw left, then right, then center. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Chin Lift
face_exercises.description: Tilt your head back gently and look at the ceiling. Push your lower lip over the upper lip. Hold, then return to neutral. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Tilt your head back. Look up at the ceiling. Push lower lip over upper lip. Hold. Return. Repeat.
steps: Push lower lip over upper lip

face_exercises.name: Fish Face
face_exercises.description: Suck your cheeks in between your teeth to create a fish face. Hold for a moment, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Suck cheeks in to make a fish face. Hold. Relax. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Cheek Lift
face_exercises.description: Smile with your mouth closed and push your cheeks upward toward your eyes. Hold, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Smile with mouth closed. Push cheeks up toward eyes. Hold. Relax. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Eye Widening
face_exercises.description: Open your eyes as wide as possible without raising your eyebrows. Hold, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Open eyes wide without raising eyebrows. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Open eyes as wide as possible

face_exercises.name: Mewing
face_exercises.description: Place your tongue flat against the roof of your mouth. Close your lips gently and breathe through your nose. Hold the position.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Press your tongue flat against the roof of your mouth. Close lips gently. Breathe through your nose. Hold.
steps: Press tongue flat on roof of mouth

face_exercises.name: Neck Extensions
face_exercises.description: Tilt your head back slowly, looking up at the ceiling. Hold at the top, feeling the stretch in your neck. Return to center slowly.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Tilt your head back slowly. Look up. Feel the stretch in your neck. Hold. Return to center.

face_exercises.name: Neck Lift
face_exercises.description: Look up toward the ceiling, then push your lower jaw forward and upward. Hold the position, feeling the stretch under your chin.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Look up toward ceiling. Push jaw forward and up. Feel stretch under chin. Hold.

face_exercises.name: Jaw Clench Hold
face_exercises.description: Clench your jaw firmly, pressing your teeth together. Hold for several seconds, then relax completely. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Clench your jaw firmly. Press teeth together. Hold. Relax completely.

face_exercises.name: Surprised Face
face_exercises.description: Raise both eyebrows as high as possible while simultaneously opening your mouth wide. Hold, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise eyebrows high and open mouth wide at the same time. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Open mouth wide at the same time

face_exercises.name: Cheek Puff
face_exercises.description: Puff out your cheeks with air while keeping your mouth closed. Hold, then release. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Puff out your cheeks with air. Keep mouth closed. Hold. Release. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: O Face
face_exercises.description: Form a narrow 'O' shape with your lips. Keep the opening round and tight while slightly opening your mouth. Hold, then relax.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Form a narrow O shape with lips. Keep round and tight. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Form a narrow O with your lips
Keep the shape round and tight

face_exercises.name: Nose Scrunch
face_exercises.description: Scrunch your nose upward as if smelling something bad. Feel the crease form between your eyebrows and nose. Hold, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Scrunch your nose upward. Feel the crease form. Hold. Relax. Repeat.
steps: Feel crease between brows and nose

body_exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet together and arms at sides. Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead. Return to start.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Jump and spread your legs while raising arms overhead. Jump back to start.

body_exercises.name: Squats
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body as if sitting in a chair. Keep your back straight.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Lower down as if sitting. Keep your back straight.
steps: Lower body like sitting in a chair

body_exercises.name: High Knees
body_exercises.description: Stand in place and run, bringing your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms for momentum.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Run in place. Bring your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms.

body_exercises.name: Arm Raises
body_exercises.description: Stand with arms at your sides. Raise both arms straight in front until above shoulder height. Lower slowly.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise both arms in front above shoulder height. Lower slowly. Repeat.

body_exercises.name: Pushups
body_exercises.description: Start in plank position. Lower your body until chest nearly touches the floor. Push back up.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Start in plank position. Lower your chest to the floor. Push back up.

body_exercises.name: Standing Knee Raises
body_exercises.description: Stand tall. Raise one knee to chest height, then switch legs. Keep alternating in a controlled manner.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise one knee to chest. Switch legs. Keep alternating.
steps: Raise one knee to chest height

body_exercises.name: Side Steps
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet together. Step wide to one side, then bring feet together. Alternate sides.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Step wide to one side, then together. Alternate sides.

body_exercises.name: Plank
body_exercises.description: Hold a push-up position with arms straight. Keep your body in a straight line. Engage your core.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Get into push up position. Keep your body straight. Engage your core. Hold.
steps: Arms straight, body in a line

body_exercises.name: Burpees
body_exercises.description: Start standing. Drop into a squat, kick feet back into plank, return to squat, and jump up with arms overhead.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Drop to squat. Kick feet back to plank. Return to squat. Jump up with arms overhead.

body_exercises.name: Wall Sit
body_exercises.description: Lean against a wall with your back flat. Slide down until knees are bent at 90 degrees. Hold the position.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Lean against wall. Slide down until knees at 90 degrees. Hold position.
steps: Slide down until knees at 90 degrees

body_exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
body_exercises.description: Start in plank position. Drive one knee toward your chest, then switch legs quickly. Keep your core tight.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Start in plank. Drive knee to chest. Switch legs quickly. Keep core tight.

body_exercises.name: Dynamic Plank
body_exercises.description: Hold plank position. Alternate between resting on forearms and pushing up to full hands. Keep your core engaged.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Hold plank. Alternate between forearms and full hands. Keep core tight.

body_exercises.name: Star Crunch
body_exercises.description: Lie on your back with arms and legs spread wide in a star shape. Crunch to bring hands and feet together in the middle. Return and repeat.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Lie on back. Spread arms and legs wide. Crunch to bring hands and feet together. Return. Repeat.
steps: Lie on back in star shape

body_exercises.name: Tuck Crunches
body_exercises.description: Lie on your back with hands behind your head. Bring your knees to your chest while lifting your shoulders off the ground. Return and repeat.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Lie on back. Bring knees to chest. Lift shoulders off ground. Return. Repeat.
steps: Lie on back, hands behind head

body_exercises.name: Rear Lunges
body_exercises.description: Stand tall. Step one foot backward into a deep lunge, lowering your back knee toward the floor. Return to standing. Alternate legs.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Step one foot back into a lunge. Lower back knee. Return to standing. Alternate legs.
